---
title: 'llegir module interpretation report'
date: '`r format(Sys.time(), "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M")`'
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: cosmo
params:
  interps: !r NULL
  packets: !r NULL
  desc: !r NULL
---

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

interps <- params$interps
packets <- params$packets
desc <- params$desc

# module order is driven by the interpretations; a packet with no matching
# interpretation is skipped rather than rendered evidence-only
module_ids <- names(interps)

# flatten one fragment's top_findings (a list of named lists, one per salient
# item) into a character data.frame for a clean kable, coercing every cell to a
# scalar string so ragged / nested entries never break the table
findings_table <- function(top_findings) {
    if (length(top_findings) == 0) return(NULL)
    rows <- lapply(top_findings, function(item) {
        vals <- lapply(item, function(v) {
            if (length(v) == 0) return(NA_character_)
            paste(format(v, digits = 3), collapse = ', ')
        })
        as.data.frame(vals, stringsAsFactors = FALSE, check.names = FALSE)
    })
    dplyr::bind_rows(rows)
}
```

## Dataset

```{r dataset, results = 'asis'}
cat(render_dataset_description(desc))
```

# Modules {.tabset .tabset-fade}

```{r modules, results = 'asis'}
for (module_id in module_ids) {
    interp <- interps[[module_id]]
    packet <- packets[[module_id]]

    cat('\n\n## ', module_id, ' — ', interp$proposed_label, '\n\n', sep = '')
    cat('*', interp$one_line_summary, '*\n\n', sep = '')

    cat('### AI narrative\n\n')
    cat('**Dominant biology.** ', interp$dominant_biology, '\n\n', sep = '')

    if (!is.null(interp$cell_state) && !is.na(interp$cell_state)) {
        cat('**Cell state.** ', interp$cell_state, '\n\n', sep = '')
    }
    if (!is.null(interp$condition_dynamics) && !is.na(interp$condition_dynamics)) {
        cat('**Condition dynamics.** ', interp$condition_dynamics, '\n\n', sep = '')
    }

    if (length(interp$supporting_claims) > 0) {
        cat('**Supporting evidence.**\n\n')
        for (claim in interp$supporting_claims) {
            cat('- ', claim$claim,
                ' (', paste(claim$fragment_ids, collapse = ', '),
                '; direction: ', claim$direction, ')\n', sep = '')
        }
        cat('\n')
    }

    if (length(interp$metadata_associations) > 0) {
        cat('**Metadata associations.**\n\n')
        for (assoc in interp$metadata_associations) {
            cat('- ', assoc$variable, ': ', assoc$summary,
                ' (', assoc$fragment_id, ')\n', sep = '')
        }
        cat('\n')
    }

    cat('**Confidence.** ', sprintf('%.2f', interp$confidence$score),
        ' — ', interp$confidence$rationale, '\n\n', sep = '')
    if (length(interp$flags) > 0) {
        cat('**Flags.** ', paste(unlist(interp$flags), collapse = ', '), '\n\n', sep = '')
    }

    #-----------------------------------------------------------
    # raw supporting evidence pulled from the paired packet
    #-----------------------------------------------------------

    cat('### Raw supporting evidence\n\n')
    if (is.null(packet) || length(packet$fragments) == 0) {
        cat('*No evidence packet found for this module.*\n\n')
        next
    }

    for (frag in packet$fragments) {
        cat('#### `', frag$fragment_id, '` (', frag$type, ')\n\n', sep = '')
        cat(frag$compact_summary, '\n\n', sep = '')

        tbl <- findings_table(frag$top_findings)
        if (!is.null(tbl) && nrow(tbl) > 0) {
            print(knitr::kable(tbl, format = 'markdown'))
            cat('\n\n')
        }
    }
}
```
